setintervaltip: 必须是正整数 importtip: 导入学习材料 urlfilter: 单词模板的网址 setbodytip: 显示注解条目的条件。"},"$:/plugins/oflg/fishing-catchfish/styles.css":{"title":"$:/plugins/oflg/fishing-catchfish/styles.css","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","text":"\rules only filteredtranscludeinline
